MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RONALD PEREIRA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT COULD REASONABLY HAVE BELIEVED HE WAS NOT A PARTY GIVEN THE PRIOR DEFAULT AGAINST BESOS AND THE NOTICE OF TRIAL THAT REFERS ONLY TO BESOS. ((302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Court Trial this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Atty. Robert D. Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditor's Trade Association;
No appearance for the defendants Beso Foods Inc and Ronald Pereira.
Witness Ross Hawkins was sworn and examined for the plaintiff.
The following exhibits were identified and moved into evidence:
Exh. 1-Monthly statement of SF Chronicle
Exh. 2- Application for credit
Exh. 3- Articles of incorporation of Beso Foods
Exh. 4- Copy of minutes, Beso Foods
Exh. 5- Stock certificate
Exh. 6- Certificate of dissolution of Beso Foods
Exh. 7- Election to amortize Organizational expenditures;
Exh. 8- 2004 Income Tax Return of Beso Foods

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court took the matter under submission. Counsel to include both names in proposed judgment.
(Principal-$ 2,800.10; Cost- $270.00; Interest -$421.19)

Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits.
